title: MISO LMP Real Time Hourly Final JSON API
description:
Final hourly real-time LMPs for each Pnode in MISO, includes energy, loss, and
congestion components. It takes 3-5 days for MISO to finalize LMPs, so these values
will be delayed by several days from the market date. This dataset includes the location types:
- *Gennode*
-  *Hub*
-  *Interface*
-  *Loadzone*

For more information see the MISO Pricing Reports Guide (PDF): [https://misodocs.blob.core.windows.net/marketreports/Real-Time Preliminary Market LMPs_MISO Pricing Reports Readers Guide.pdf](https://misodocs.blob.core.windows.net/marketreports/Real-Time%20Preliminary%20Market%20LMPs_MISO%20Pricing%20Reports%20Readers%20Guide.pdf)
